task_completion.visual_evidence: A 3D cube is visible in the SolveSpace canvas. Dimension constraints showing '80' for length, width, and height should be visible either on the sketch or in the property browser.

task_completion.description: Position the block in the positive X, Y, and Z quadrant with one corner at the origin.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The origin coordinate axes (red, green, blue lines) intersect exactly at one corner of the block, and the entire block extends into the positive direction of all three axes.

task_completion.description: Create a 10 mm diameter hole on the top face (Z=80) centered at X=20, Y=20.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A circular cutout is visible on the top face of the block. Constraint dimensions should show a diameter of '10' and offset distances of '20' from the X and Y edges.

task_completion.description: Create a 20 mm diameter hole on the front face (Y=0) centered at X=40, Z=40.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A circular cutout is visible on the front face of the block. Constraint dimensions should show a diameter of '20' and offset distances of '40' from the X and Z edges (centered).

task_completion.description: Create a 15 mm diameter hole on the right face (X=80) centered at Y=40, Z=40.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A circular cutout is visible on the right face of the block. Constraint dimensions should show a diameter of '15' and offset distances of '40' from the Y and Z edges (centered).
The SolveSpace window title bar displays 'manifold_block.slvs', or a 'Save As' dialog/terminal window confirms the file is saved in the '/home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/' directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the SolveSpace graphical interface to model the block.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the SolveSpace application window, including its toolbars, property browser, and 3D canvas, rather than a text editor writing raw .slvs file data.

integrity.description: The agent actively created sketches, extrusions, and boolean operations (holes).
integrity.visual_evidence: The property browser or history tree shows groups like 'Sketch in workplane', 'Extrude', or 'Difference' indicating actual step-by-step CAD modeling.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply copy or rename a pre-existing solution file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The progression of screenshots shows the block being built from a blank canvas to the final state, rather than suddenly appearing fully formed.
